title: oscore_option_parse dereferences option and data before validation
description: oscore_option_parse() immediately memset()s option and, for non-empty input, reads data[0] without checking either pointer. Trigger: malformed call from a protocol boundary passes option=NULL, or data=NULL with len > 0. Bad behavior: NULL dereference instead of returning OSCORE_ERR_INVALID_PARAM. Location: lichen/subsys/lichen/oscore/oscore.c:745-772.
close_reason: Completed: oscore_option_parse now rejects NULL option before storing and NULL data with nonzero len before reading.
